title: New Zapier integration Comments column question
excerpt: The new Zap is a lot easier. I have a question about how to put data in the Monday Comments column. Do we just add the trigger value only or does the comments field require JSON format? We added the podio value here with…

posts.author: dfurt (Daniel Furtick)
posts.cookedHtml: The new Zap is a lot easier. I have a question about how to put data in the Monday Comments column. Do we just add the trigger value only or does the comments field require JSON format? We added the podio value here with no formatting and this field didnt go thru
